acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Workspace checkpoints are persisted locally immediately without forcing a remote commit per notification
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Checkpoint events use the durable append-only outbox and normal non-critical batching.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Non-critical audit events flush in batches of 50 or after 60 seconds while terminal events flush immediately
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Outbox batching and critical-boundary regression tests pass.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Provider rate pressure is reduced without losing reconstructible state
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Measured live workload models 168 checkpoint commits as approximately 4 batches, a 97.6% reduction.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Audit summaries respect the game-api 2000-character contract
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: New Unicode-safe truncation retains full redacted metadata while bounding summaries exactly.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Legacy oversized pending summaries recover without data loss
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Recovered unconfirmed events are normalized and atomically rehashed from the confirmed remote projection.
304 tests, 100% coverage, zero Credo issues and zero Dialyzer errors.

summary: Durable checkpoint batching, provider-pressure controls and backward-compatible outbox recovery are complete on the exact HEAD.
